inputs.label: Surface Area per Part
inputs.businessContext: Total surface area of a single part to be coated, measured in square meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total surface area of a single part to be coated, measured in square meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaplanacak tek bir parçanın toplam yüzey alanı, metrekare cinsinden ölçülür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtoberfläche eines einzelnen zu beschichtenden Teils, gemessen in Quadratmetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface totale d'une seule pièce à revêtir, mesurée en mètres carrés.

inputs.label: Coating Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Target dry film thickness of the coating, measured in micrometers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Target dry film thickness of the coating, measured in micrometers.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaplamanın hedef kuru film kalınlığı, mikrometre cinsinden ölçülür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ziel-Trockenfilmdicke der Beschichtung, gemessen in Mikrometern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur cible du film sec du revêtement, mesurée en micromètres.

inputs.label: Coating Material Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the coating material in its dried state, in kilograms per cubic meter.

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the coating material in its dried state, in kilograms per cubic meter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaplama malzemesinin kuru haldeki yoğunluğu, metreküp başına kilogram cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dichte des Beschichtungsmaterials im getrockneten Zustand, in Kilogramm pro Kubikmeter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité du matériau de revêtement à l'état sec, en kilogrammes par mètre cube.

inputs.label: Number of Parts
inputs.businessContext: Quantity of parts to be coated in the batch.

businessContext_i18n.en: Quantity of parts to be coated in the batch.
businessContext_i18n.de: Menge der in der Charge zu beschichtenden Teile.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quantité de pièces à revêtir dans le lot.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
